Thanks for opening a pull request. Please fill in the sections below so reviewers have enough context.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / internal tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests that cover the change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if the public API changed
- [ ] Added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] For breaking changes: added steps to `UPGRADING.md`

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific you want reviewers to focus on? -->
